svg.title: Automataii assembly guide gear-train-basic
svg.desc: Board-coordinate assembly guide for Two-gear crank.
svg.text: Follow one card at a time. Keep fasteners loose until motion is smooth.
Place a paper fastener at H6.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Add one S8 spacer, then place G12 on H6.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Place G16 at I8 so the two gears touch lightly.

g.text: Both gears turn when G12 turns.
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Use a handle hole on G12 and rotate slowly.

g.text: If the mesh binds, loosen both fasteners.
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.
